CHIEF PAEDIATRIC INTENSIVIST

Dr. Sanjay D Swamy

DNB (Paediatrics) | FPCC (IAP) | FPIC (UK)

With 18 years of specialist experience, Dr. Swamy is one of India's leading experts in Paediatric Intensive Care, currently serving in Apollo Cradle Electronic City, Bangalore.

18+ Years Experience
7+ Institutions
2 Countries
Book Consultation View Services

CREDENTIALS

Professional Qualifications

Internationally recognized certifications and advanced training in pediatric intensive care medicine.

DNB (Paediatrics)

Diplomate of National Board - Comprehensive postgraduate qualification in pediatric medicine

FPCC (IAP)

Fellowship in Paediatric Critical Care from Indian Academy of Pediatrics

FPIC (UK)

Fellowship in Paediatric Intensive Care from United Kingdom

Advanced PICU Training

Birmingham Children's Hospital, United Kingdom - World-class critical care training

SPECIALIZATIONS

Areas of Expertise

Extensively trained in treating critically ill neonates and children with complex medical conditions.

01

Advanced ARDS Ventilation

Expert management of acute respiratory distress syndrome with advanced ventilation techniques.

02

Post-operative Transplant Care

Specialized care for pediatric patients following organ transplantation procedures.

03

Cardiac Surgical Care

Post-operative management of pediatric cardiac surgery patients with complex conditions.

04

ECMO Support

Extracorporeal membrane oxygenation for critical life support in severe cases.

CAREER PATH

Professional Journey

A distinguished career spanning prestigious institutions across India and the United Kingdom.

Current

Apollo Cradle Electronic City, Bangalore

Chief Paediatric Intensivist

Leading the PICU department with state-of-the-art facilities and comprehensive critical care services.

UK

Royal Victoria Infirmary, Newcastle

Locum Consultant Paediatric Intensivist

Narayana Institute of Cardiac Sciences

Consultant

UK

Birmingham Children's Hospital

Clinical Fellow - PICU and Retrieval Service

St John's Medical Teaching Hospital

Specialist

Manipal Hospital, Bangalore

Clinical Fellow

Christian Medical College, Vellore

Senior House Officer

NHS EXPERIENCE

International Training

Hands-on experience with NHS Paediatric Transport Teams in the United Kingdom.

NHS UK

KIDS

Birmingham Transport Team - Specialized in critical care transport of pediatric patients across the region.

NHS UK

NECTAR

Newcastle Transport Team - Experience with neonatal and pediatric emergency transport services.

Every critically ill child deserves the highest standard of care. My training across world-class institutions in India and the UK enables me to provide evidence-based, compassionate critical care to the most vulnerable young patients.
— Dr. Sanjay D Swamy

AWARDS & RECOGNITION

Honoring Excellence in Pediatric Care

Recognized for outstanding contributions to pediatric intensive care medicine and dedication to improving child healthcare outcomes.

Get expert pediatric care from one of India's leading intensivists. Book your appointment for a reassuring and professional experience.
